puzzles.name: Seagull
puzzles.funFact:
Seagull droppings are called “Guano”.
Guano has been used as fertilizer for plants and crops for centuries. Consisting primarily of nitrogen-rich ammonia salts, guano provides essential nutrients to the soil

puzzles.name: Crab
puzzles.funFact: Crabs can walk in all four directions, but they prefer to walk sideways.

puzzles.name: Clam
puzzles.funFact: Clams can live in both freshwater and marine environments. And are also known for their unique ability to filter up to 4.5 gallons of water a day, helping to purify their surroundings.

puzzles.name: sculpin
puzzles.funFact: Sculpin are typically small, bottom-dwelling fish known for their large heads and fanlike pectoral fins.
